title: SCP-250, Most of an Allosaurus
description: A fossil that comes to life and hunts it's prey...
body:
Most of an Allosaurus adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-250, also known as Most of an Allosaurus.


This skeleton is extremely aggressive, attacking both players and animals with high damage. During the night, SCP-250 will sleep, but if disturbed, it awakens again. When angered, SCP-250 can produce a terrifying roar or smash through blocks such as glass or wood, adding to its destructive power. Upon killing an entity, SCP-250 devours it and regenerates health. When defeated, there is a chance it drops an Allosaurus Skull, which can be worn as a helmet or crafted into a fossil that can be placed and rotated for display.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-250 spawn?

SCP-250 can spawn anywhere on the overworld surface like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-250.

</details>



![SCP-250](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d21193a069e544e273066c43a18832187a487ef_0.webp)

SCP-250 is an Allosaurus skeleton that roams the surface world. It has immense health and damage, attacking any animal, villager or player nearby. At night, SCP-250 sleeps when there is no prey nearby. if SCP-250 is attacked while sleeping, it will awakens and attack nearby mobs, but will fall asleep when out of range, until sun rises. The attacks of SCP-250 inflict the bleeding effect, and the creature can roar when angered, weakening and slowing nearby creatures around it while causing nearby players’ screens to shake. SCP-250 is capable of smashing through fragile blocks like glass or wood when aggressive, making it a dangerous force to encounter. When SCP-250 kills an entity, it will devourer them and regenerate. If someone manages to kill SCP-250, it will drop an Allosaurus Skull which can be used as an helmet or can be crafted into an Allosaurus Fossil which can be placed down. If you right click it, it will change it's pose and if you sneak and right click it, it will rotate, perfect for decoration but don't let a lightning bolt hit the fossil, or it will reawaken as a new Instance of SCP-250.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
